svg.text: MongoDB Atlas × Temporal — Architecture & Data Flow
LoanApplicationWorkflow · task-queue: loan-processing · namespace: default · Activities retried up to 3× with exponential backoff · Checkpointed after each stage
Atlas status progression: submitted → embedding_complete → retrieval_complete → analysis_complete → pending_review → decided
↻ RetryPolicy: max 3 attempts · 2 s initial interval · 2× backoff · 30 s max · Activities independently retried without re-running prior stages
🔒 Temporal checkpoints after each Activity — kill the worker mid-run, restart it, the workflow resumes from the last completed stage with zero data loss
Last run: loan-app-28e46dd1 · risk_score: 0.22 · recommendation: APPROVE · Decision: APPROVED by officer_42 · ~7 seconds end-to-end
Vector Index: loan_embedding_index · cosine · 1024 dims · filter: decision.outcome, _id
Fields stored: embedding · similar_applications · ai_analysis · decision · status
Seed data: 15 historical loans · 11 approved · 4 denied · embedded via voyage-4-large
Each Activity reads/writes Atlas — state visible in Atlas UI at every stage
